description.en: Convert a JPG or PNG image file to PDF format.
description.de: Eine JPG- oder PNG-Bilddatei in das PDF-Format umwandeln.
description.es: Convert a JPG or PNG image file to PDF format.
description.fr: Convert a JPG or PNG image file to PDF format.
description.ro: Convert a JPG or PNG image file to PDF format.
description.it: Convert a JPG or PNG image file to PDF format.

inputs.name: Input File

description.en: Path to the JPG or PNG image file
description.es: Path to the JPG or PNG image file
description.fr: Path to the JPG or PNG image file
description.ro: Path to the JPG or PNG image file
description.it: Path to the JPG or PNG image file

inputs.bot: The source image file path (JPG or PNG). Look for a file path in the context, clipboard, or user message.

inputs.name: Output File

description.en: Path for the output PDF file
description.es: Path for the output PDF file
description.fr: Path for the output PDF file
description.ro: Path for the output PDF file
description.it: Path for the output PDF file

inputs.bot: The output PDF file path. If not specified, use the same path as the input file but replace the extension with .pdf.
